title: Why You're Still Better Than AI at Editing Documents - CS50 Tech Talk
summary: CS50 argues that humans remain better than AI at reliably editing documents because AI struggles with the complex structural logic embedded in formats like .docx files. The talk contends that treating documents as software rather than simple text files is necessary for AI systems to operate at scale on document editing tasks.
